pages.text: A &6crisis&r is a settlement-wide event that demands a decision, not a quiet background timer. The first you will meet is Starvation, which makes permanent food production urgent and visible.
When a crisis fires, the side objective tracker shows the path you have chosen to resolve it. The Chronicle keeps the permanent knowledge; the tracker keeps the live task list.
Crises are not there to punish you — they exist to make important systems impossible to ignore. Answering one well leaves your settlement stronger than before it began.
